title: TFC+ Bids
description: Adds new crucibles, oh and bits
body:
## TFC Plus - Bids and Pieces
An addon for [Terrafirmacraft+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrafirmacraftplus) that aims to demonstrate various fully featured enhancements for gameplay and testing.

This addon attempts to make you have more fun by adding the following:

#### Clay and Fireclay Crucible - new crucibles with improved mechanics
  - Smelts multiple stacks of items at a time
  - Content and temperature shown in the inventory
  - Shows the result of smelting or alloying (optional)
  - Automatically mixes alloys when inactive
  - Clay Crucible is available in the Stone Age (with limited capabilities)

#### Ore Bits - breaking ore chunks into smaller pieces
  - Can help with alloying math
